runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - AI fragile load-query phrasing probe on v8.11.128
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production deployment dpl_DHdZWyaDQmUoS8sWbivAHX7rFbso is Ready and aliased to https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
/api/version reports v8.11.128, commit 86eca846646f85527cc299096bff9c4d8a2e5dff, and release pipeline 2516275363
Dashboard guest flow opened the AI sidebar with AI engine status Ready
Fragile whole-fleet load phrasing variants were tested through the real UI path without bypassing CSRF
Explicit 'whole fleet / last 24h / load1 / max timestamp' query returned the expected peak timestamp 2026-05-10 03:50, load1 16.58, and top contributors
Explicit Korean query with 'CPU 사용률 말고 ... load1만' returned the expected peak timestamp 2026-05-10 03:50, load1 16.58, and top contributors
Browser console reported 0 warnings and 0 errors
skippedSurfaces: Full five-question conversational AI QA was not repeated to avoid unnecessary live LLM cost; this run targeted vulnerable peak-load phrasing only
Core route pack beyond dashboard AI sidebar

aiLatencyObservations.surface: AI sidebar fragile Korean load phrasing
aiLatencyObservations.source: Playwright MCP visible response and network/resource evidence

plannerShadowObservations.source: Visible answers returned CPU/memory evidence and recent-1h metadata for natural load phrasing even when CPU was explicitly excluded.

expertAssessments.rationale: The explicit load1 forms pass, but natural Korean load phrasing can drift to CPU/memory evidence and recent-1h metadata even when the user asks for recent 하루 and excludes CPU.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Route load/부하/system load natural phrasing through the semantic IntentFrame metric_peak/load1 capability before generic server metric fallback.

expertAssessments.rationale: The production deployment is Ready, /api/version matches v8.11.128, AI paths returned HTTP 200/201, and Vercel usage remains within the expected no-billed-usage guardrail.
The run used a small risk-based prompt set through Playwright MCP and captured structured result, network, and console evidence without broad live LLM repetition.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after targeted fragile load-query QA; effective 6.7213 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 6090.

artifacts.label: Fragile load-query raw result and resource timings

pendingImprovements.title: AI Assistant natural load phrasing can drift from load1/24h whole-fleet intent to CPU/recent-1h metric evidence
pendingImprovements.note: Two vulnerable prompts failed: '최근 하루 중 1분 load가 제일 튄 시각' returned CPU 96% and recent-1h metadata, and 'CPU 말고 시스템 load 기준' still returned CPU/memory evidence. Explicit load1 prompts pass, so the issue is semantic metric/time-window drift in natural phrasing.

notes: This QA intentionally probes weaker phrasing on the unchanged v8.11.128 production build after a passing explicit peak-load regression recheck.
The result supports improving the semantic parser/domain resolver path instead of adding one-off hard-coded Korean regexes.
This is not a deployment availability issue; it is an AI routing/evidence grounding quality issue.
